Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/53e82780a3603e91f5db58599958e1c100a1d9f2288f9d575bc0c225eb1f4f04/8435e2e3-edd0-435e-9f9d-ac707e5b7053/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
